translated: [CORNER: Lunchtime Request] Please listen to it.
Yoneme Mei, "Sky Linker."
The reason you only notice the missing pieces
is because you know what perfection looks like.
But that's okay.
I'm far from a god who can end someone's hesitation,
but I'll stay in the rain with you until we find it.
My wish is in the blue sky, I'll take the hand that reaches for it.
I'll block out everything, yes, everything that's hazy.
I'll even protect you from fate itself.
Always,
yes, always, don't lose to this depressing world today.
Rise up
and fly over the many obstacles to reach our destination.
We've become what you call comrades.
When I pray for someone other than myself, I'll prove there's not a single cloud of doubt.
Dive into the blue sky; if you hold this hand, I'll do it.
Everything,
yes, everything—what's wrong with being weak?
If you want to cry, let's cry and scream, I don't mind.
Always,
yes, always, I'll accept any version of you.
Show me.
Even if you're cracked, I'll show you I can take it all without breaking.
If you want a tough vessel, if you want a clear present, I'll change it for you right now.
In that blue sky,
if you look up, I'll take you into the brilliant blue.
Everything,
yes, everything that's hazy, I'll block it out.
I'll even protect you from fate itself.
I'll support you; you have a place here.
Don't lose, ever.
Love Live! Superstar!! Yuigaoka Girls' Lunchtime Broadcast Station, Liella!
Radio.
[CORNER: Closing] News from Love Live! Superstar!!
Here is the music information.
On Wednesday, July 8th, the release of the Liella!
and Musubu Project mini-album has been confirmed.
We will release five versions: Original, Photo, Team Kids, Team Sports, and Team Green.
The Original, Team Kids, Team Sports, and Team Green versions feature new illustrations,
while the Photo version uses new photos of the cast.
It will include 4 songs, including one new group track, plus off-vocal versions for a total of 8 tracks.
As a first-press bonus, the Original, Team Kids,
Team Sports, and Team Green versions will include member stickers.
The Photo version will include a purikura-style sticker.
All versions will include an advance lottery application ticket for the Love Live! Series 15th Anniversary Love Live! Fes
and Love Live! Superstar!!.
Additionally, as a bundle purchase bonus, we'll be giving away
a Liella! sticker book.
Don't forget to pre-order.
To celebrate the release of the Liella!
and Musubu Project mini-album, we've decided to hold a handover event.
The dates are Friday, October 2nd, and Friday, October 9th.
Those who pre-order or purchase the Liella!
and Musubu Project mini-album at participating stores will be invited to the handover event via lottery.
The cast members vary by date, so please check the application guidelines before applying.
Check the Love Live! Superstar!! official website for details.
News from the Love Live! Series Official Card Game.
The Start Deck "Love Live! Superstar!!",
featuring only Liella! members and songs, will be released on Saturday, May 30th.
This product will include a special rarity "Secret Serial" card with a serial number.
Each numbered card is a super-luxurious, one-of-a-kind item in the world.
The Start Deck allows you to play LoveCa! immediately, so even if you haven't played before, please pick this up and get started.
Latest info will be posted on the Love Live! official site and X, so keep an eye out.
Appearance information.
Starting April 1st, Liella!'s
"ChuChu Liella!"
Season 2 will begin on Nippon TV.
Panshin No. 3 will continue as the program MC from Season 1.
Catch-up streaming will be available on TVer and Nittele TADA after the broadcast.
Don't forget to check it out.
Furthermore, to commemorate the broadcast, the live event "Love Live! Superstar!! Liella!
no ChuChu Liella!
2026" will be held at LaLa arena TOKYO-BAY on August 1st and 2nd.
Official secondary lottery applications are open on Ticket Pia until 11:59 PM on Sunday, April 5th.
Please check this out as well.
For details on all the information announced today, please check the Liella!
official X account and the Love Live! Superstar!! official website.
That's all for the announcements.
Love Live! Superstar!! Yuigaoka Girls' Lunchtime Broadcast Station, Liella!
